dependency_light_contracts.scope: replay, attention-area reduction, lineage atomicity, cached-reference equivalence, gradient flow, RSLoRA fallback, fusion scaling, and non-promotion contracts

hosted_linux_cpu_rslora_rehearsal.claim_boundary: This proves real hosted-CPU RSLoRA updates and bounded held-out movement on the 0.6B rehearsal model and corpus. It does not establish canonical Qwen3-1.7B, CUDA/NF4, fusion, quantization, broad capability, or admission evidence.

next_required_evidence_sequence: freeze exact base, tokenizer, trajectory batch, profile, and code digests
prove initial and trained adapter tensors differ
compare each specialist against the frozen base on the full held-out sequence
fuse only non-regressive specialists using exact scale-aware delta concatenation
evaluate the fused adapter against the frozen base
run the personally designed whole-intention benchmark suite
admit or reject without changing the evidence
false_claims_to_reject: contract tests are equivalent to training
CPU segmentation is a neural update
a hosted CPU rehearsal on Qwen3-0.6B proves the canonical Qwen3-1.7B model improved
a successful workflow status proves a model improved
an unadmitted adapter is the released Archie model
source_of_truth: Receipt-bound artifacts produced by the canonical workflow and benchmark suite, with explicitly bounded rehearsal evidence recorded separately.
